markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Recap Prophecy's content strategy progress with GrowthX and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has completed initial research and topic prioritization, with a calibration article on "Blocking ELT" due tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Performance tracking will focus on impressions, clicks, and rankings, with refinement based on data and Prophecy's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [The team aims to scale content production after establishing the right processes and tone, with a 3-month mark typically showing significant traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Progress

  - [Completed initial research on search terms and competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Created a list of opportunities refined with Matt's input](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Developed an Airtable with topic clusters and assignments](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Selected "Blocking ELT" as the first calibration article topic](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Ongoing process of refining proposed topics and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Performance Tracking and Refinement

  - [Key metrics: impressions, click-through rates, and Google rankings](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Early focus on indexing speed and impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [By month 3, expect significant uptick in traffic (e.g., from 50 to 120+ clicks/week)](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Will use data to inform topic prioritization and content enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Approach allows for experimentation and iterative improvement](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

### ETL vs. ELT Terminology

  - [Both terms show equal opportunity in search](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Content will address the broader theme of data pipeline transformation](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Future articles may explore the differences between ETL and ELT](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Team will monitor which term attracts better-fit prospects for Prophecy](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### Calibration Article and Feedback

  - [First article to be delivered tomorrow for Prophecy's review](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Seeking feedback on product connection, context, and addressing sales team FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Aim to decrease the feedback burden on Prophecy's team over time](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Gated Content and Lead Generation

  - [Initial focus on organic content close to Prophecy's product](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Open to plugging into existing demand-gen strategies (e.g., webinars, podcasts)](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Suggestion to create content "kits" combining various assets for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Potential to repurpose upcoming webinar content for longer-format gated material](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to deliver calibration article on "Blocking ELT" tomorrow for Prophecy's review](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Prophecy team to provide detailed feedback on the calibration article](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Continue refining topics and cleaning up the Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to integrate with Prophecy's existing content (e.g., webinars, LinkedIn program)](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss progress and potential gated content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/W7UynPjoVJDUrD8Gdxt4Ax-37b_5e4j5?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)
